codeReview.summary: The Reminders tab feature is largely implemented (Ctrl+6 tab, ReminderItem rendering, create/complete/edit/delete actions, empty state, and regression bindings), but there is a blocking correctness issue in reminder action targeting after filter changes.

issues.description: `action_filter_reminder_list()` updates `_rem_list_filter` and re-renders the sidebar but does not clear `active_reminder` or the detail pane. Reminder actions (`action_complete_reminder` at line 1110, `action_edit_reminder` at line 1143, `action_delete_reminder` at line 1158) operate on `active_reminder` only, so after changing filters a hidden previously-selected reminder can still be completed/edited/deleted. This can apply destructive actions to an item that is no longer visible/selected in the current filtered view.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff `commitId` for this feature points to a library-note commit instead of the implementation commit, which makes automated review/diff lookup ambiguous.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff file `handoffs/2026-04-10T19-55-11-613Z__reminders-tui-tab__36c1eb47-909f-495a-ad7b-2c51bfff5d1b.json` has `commitId: 223bf9f`, but `git show --stat 223bf9f` only changes `.factory/library/reminders-tab.md`; feature code changes are in `85b66ab` (`inbox.py`, `tests/test_inbox_app.py`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker transcript records hypothetical interactive checks ("Would launch TUI...") instead of an actual tuistory run, despite the skill recommending tuistory when available for visual TUI verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session `36c1eb47-909f-495a-ad7b-2c51bfff5d1b` includes no `Skill` call for `tuistory`; handoff interactiveChecks are phrased as hypothetical actions rather than executed captures.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, and relevant diffs for reminders-tui-tab. Feature implementation is substantial, but fails review due to stale `active_reminder` state allowing complete/edit/delete on hidden reminders after list-filter changes.
